channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Surges to Highest Since 2022 as US Military Prepares New Iran Strike Plans
item.description: Brent crude jumped nearly 7% to over $126 per barrel after reports that US Central Command has prepared plans for "short and powerful" strikes on Iran. The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed, disrupting about a fifth of global energy supplies.

item.title: 🏛️ Supreme Court Weakens Voting Rights Act in Louisiana Redistricting Case
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down a majority-Black congressional district in Louisiana in a 6-3 ruling, finding it relied too heavily on race. The decision could affect nearly 70 congressional districts protected under Section 2 and reshape the 2028 electoral map.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Trump Considers Reducing US Troops in Germany After Merz Criticism
item.description: President Trump announced he is "studying" whether to reduce the more than 36,000 US troops stationed in Germany. The move follows German Chancellor Merz criticism that the US had been "humiliated" by Iranian negotiators in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Oil Facility 1,500km Inside Russia in Deep Drone Attack
item.description: Ukrainian drones hit an oil pumping station near Perm, over 1,500 kilometers from Ukraine. President Zelenskyy said Ukraine is expanding long-range strikes to limit Russias ability to wage war by denying it oil revenue.

item.title: 🇲🇽 US Indicts 10 Mexican Officials Including Sinaloa Governor for Drug Trafficking
item.description: Federal prosecutors in New York charged Sinaloa Governor Ruben Rocha Moya and nine other Mexican officials with aiding the Sinaloa Cartel. The indictment alleges they protected cartel leaders, provided law enforcement intel, and received millions in drug money.

item.title: 🛢️ Brent crude hits 4-year high as US-Iran war deadlock keeps supply off market
item.description: Oil prices surged to a four-year high on concerns that the ongoing US-Iran conflict could escalate further, leading to prolonged supply disruptions from the Middle East.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Taiwan tops Beijing agenda for Trump-Xi summit
item.description: The upcoming Trump-Xi meeting in mid-May will have profound implications for Taiwans 23 million people, with the islands status expected to dominate discussions.

item.title: 🏦 ECB holds rates steady, keeps hikes firmly on table
item.description: The European Central Bank kept interest rates unchanged but signaled further rate hikes remain possible as inflation pressures persist.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Fed holds rates steady with most divided vote since 1992
item.description: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged in a decision that showed the most divided vote since 1992, reflecting uncertainty about the economic outlook.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran detected and damaged US F-35 stealth jet in combat, Chinese experts claim
item.description: Chinese military analysts claim Iran successfully detected and damaged a US F-35 stealth fighter during the ongoing conflict, raising questions about the aircrafts stealth capabilities.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Belarus prohibits conscripts from Russia and occupied Ukraine from leaving country
item.description: Belarus has banned conscripts from Russia and occupied Ukraine from leaving the country as military tensions continue in the region.

item.title: 🛢️ Trader or driller? Iran war exposes Big Oils transatlantic divide
item.description: European oil majors posted bumper trading gains from the Iran war supply disruption, highlighting how shifting barrels can sometimes trump pumping them from the ground.

item.title: ⚔️ Hezbollah uses fiber-optic cables in drone war against Israel
item.description: Hezbollah has deployed fiber-optic communication networks to coordinate drone operations against Israel, marking a new technological escalation in the conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 White House quiet as China ramps up trade leverage before Trump-Xi summit
item.description: China is increasing its economic leverage ahead of the upcoming Trump-Xi meeting, with the White House maintaining a measured approach to trade negotiations.

item.title: 🌍 Mali turmoil threatens Russian push for influence in Africa
item.description: Reversals suffered by Malis Moscow-backed military government have dented Russias image as a security guarantor in Africa and threaten its strategic interests on the continent.

item.title: 💻 China pushes DeepSeek to bet on Huawei, end reliance on Nvidia
item.description: China is accelerating efforts to reduce dependence on US chipmaker Nvidia, with AI company DeepSeek shifting to use domestic Huawei chips as technological tensions with Washington intensify.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE reviewing multilateral ties after OPEC exit, rules out more departures
item.description: The United Arab Emirates is reassessing its international partnerships after announcing its departure from OPEC, while insisting it has no plans to leave other international organizations.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US seeks new coalition to get ships moving again through Hormuz
item.description: The US State Department has sent cables to allies seeking a new international coalition to restore commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, which remains effectively blocked.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germanys Merz says relations with Trump are good despite Iran spat
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz insisted relations with the Trump administration remain positive, despite tensions over the US approach to the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Climate finance and fossil fuels: Key takeaways from Colombia negotiations
item.description: Global climate negotiations in Colombia produced key agreements on climate finance and the transition away from fossil fuels, though major divisions remain.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea to lead joint maritime drill with US for first time
item.description: South Korea will lead a joint maritime exercise with the United States for the first time, marking a significant expansion of military cooperation between the two allies.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan shares guarded Mogami warship design with India
item.description: Japan is sharing details of its Mogami-class warship design with India as the two nations deepen defense cooperation in response to regional security challenges.

item.title: 📰 World press freedom declines as authoritarianism rises
item.description: Global press freedom has declined as authoritarian governments increasingly restrict independent journalism and suppress dissent.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine ceasefire talks face Trump-Putin complications
item.description: Prospects for a ceasefire in Ukraine are complicated by the dynamics between Trump and Putin, with negotiations facing significant hurdles.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada to host new multilateral defence bank
item.description: Canada will host a new multilateral defence development bank, reflecting efforts to coordinate defense spending among allied nations.
